modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook calendar freezes when editing public calendar appointments

full_description_text: My Outlook calendar keeps freezing up when I try to enter or edit appointments. This happens with public calendars and it’s really frustrating. I can’t seem to do anything without it not responding.
short_description: Outlook calendar freezes when editing public calendar appointments
description: My Outlook calendar keeps freezing up when I try to enter or edit appointments. This happens with public calendars and it’s really frustrating. I can’t seem to do anything without it not responding.
